/home/tools/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.2/bin/icx -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -ipo -Wl,--version-script="/home/powerzhang/zombie/deps/tbb/src/tbbmalloc/def/lin64-tbbmalloc.def" -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now,-z,noexecstack -static-intel -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -ipo -shared -Wl,-soname,libtbbmalloc.so.2 -o ../../../../intelllvm_2025.2_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc.so.2.18 CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/backref.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/large_objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/tbbmalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/__/tbb/itt_notify.cpp.o  -ldl
